✦ a little something, made just for you ✦

Happy Birthday,Yayang 💜

April 4 · The Best Day of the Year

scroll down

Hi yanggg, 🌷

I know this is just a digital letter, and maybe it does not feel as special as something written by hand, but please believe me when I say that every single word here carries everything I feel for you. I would write this a thousand times if it meant you could truly feel how much you mean to me.

Happy birthday, my love. Out of all the days in the year, this is the one I am most thankful for, because this is the day you were born. This is the day someone so important came into this world, and eventually came into my life. And honestly, meeting you is one of the best things that has ever happened to me.

You changed me in ways I did not expect. You showed me what love really feels like, not just the happy parts, but also the deep, real kind of love that stays even when things are hard. Because of you, I learned how to care more, how to be more patient, and how to love someone beyond just words.

It hurts me that I am not there with you right now. If I had the chance, I would be beside you, celebrating your day, holding your hand, and making sure you feel how special you are. But even if I am far, please know that my heart is with you.

Ikaw akong gihuna huna karon, and I wish I could be the reason behind your smile today. 🌸

Pasensya na kaayo if there were times you felt like my love was not enough or not clear. That is one of my biggest regrets, because the truth is, you mean so much more to me than I am able to show. I know I made mistakes, and I know there were times my words hurt you. I hate that I became the reason for your pain, even for a moment. You never deserved that, and I am truly sorry for every single time I failed you.

But please believe me when I say that what I feel for you is real. There was never a moment that I was pretending. Every laugh, every care, every effort I gave you came from a genuine place in my heart.

Ikaw jud, always. 🤍

Thank you for staying. Thank you for loving me even when I am not easy to love. Thank you for being patient with me, for understanding me, and for choosing me despite everything. You are someone I deeply value, someone I do not want to lose, and someone I will always choose if given the chance again and again.

On your birthday, I do not just wish you happiness. I wish you a life full of peace, growth, and love that you truly deserve. I hope all your dreams come true, and I hope that somehow, I can still be part of those dreams in the future.

Happy birthday again, my love. Please take care always. I miss you more than I can explain, and I love you more than these words can ever fully express.

Always yours,

Yieyie 🌹

Us, Together 📸

Why I Love You 💜

just a few of the many, many reasons

01The way you make ordinary days feel like something worth remembering.
02Your laugh. It is genuinely the best sound in the world and I would do anything just to hear it.
03How deeply you care about the people you love. That kind of heart is rare, and yours is one of a kind.
04You showed me what real love feels like. Not just the easy kind, but the kind that stays.
05You are my safe place. No matter where I am, thinking of you feels like home.
06You chose me, again and again, even when it was not easy. That means everything to me.
07Ikaw jud. It has always been you. It will always be you.

Your Universe 🎵

Rico Blanco

"

Our Stanza

I don't think that you even realize
The joy you make me feel when I'm inside your universe
You hold me like I'm the one who's precious
I hate to break it to you, but it's just the other way around
You can thank your stars all you want
But I'll always be the lucky one
💜

I love you so much, Yayang.

Distance is just distance. It does not change a single thing about how I feel for you. I will keep choosing you, every single day, for as long as you let me.

Happy birthday, my love. Please be happy today. You deserve it so much.

always yoursYieyie 🌹
made with love, just for you ✦ april 4
